Gain {Block:diff()} Block.

[gold]Alchemy[/gold] with this increases the [gold]Artifact[/gold]'s [gold]Durability[/gold] by {Durability:diff()}

GLADIUS-DRAGON_ORB.description: Gain {DragonAuraPower:diff()} [gold]Dragon Aura[/gold]. [gold]Alchemy[/gold] with this gain {AlchemyDragonAuraPower:diff()} [gold]Dragon Aura[/gold].

Gain {Block:diff()} Block.

GLADIUS-BREAKDOWN.description:
Reduce [gold]Durability[/gold] of an [gold]Durable[/gold] card in your [gold]Hand[/gold] by {Durability:diff()}.
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.

Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.

Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.

[gold]Retain[/gold] it this turn.

[gold]Alchemy[/gold] a [gold]{IfUpgraded:show:Dragon Scale+|Dragon Scale}[/gold] into your [gold]Hand[/gold].

Reduce [gold]Durability[/gold] of an [gold]Durable[/gold] card in your [gold]Hand[/gold] by 1.

Deal {CalculatedDamage:diff()} damage.

GLADIUS-FILL_UP.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
If you have {HandCards:diff()} or more {HandCards:plural:card|cards} in your [gold]Hand[/gold],

Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.

Deal {CalculatedDamage:diff()} damage.

GLADIUS-LIGHTNING_BLOW.description:

GLADIUS-BYPRODUCT.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.

Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.

GLADIUS-FORCE_PALM.description:
Deal {CalculatedDamage:diff()} damage.
Deals {ExtraDamage:inverseDiff()} additional damage for each X

Choose a [gold]Durable[/gold] card to lose {Durability:diff()} [gold]Durability[/gold].
Grant that much [gold]Durability[/gold] to another [gold]Durable[/gold] card.

Discard up to {Cards} {Cards:plural:card|cards}.

GLADIUS-STORM_EERTH_AND_FIRE.description: Add a [gold]{IfUpgraded:show:Wind Stone+|Wind Stone}[/gold], [gold]{IfUpgraded:show:Diamond+|Diamond}[/gold], and [gold]{IfUpgraded:show:Dragon Orb+|Dragon Orb}[/gold] into your [gold]Hand[/gold]. They cost 0 until played.

GLADIUS-FAMILIAR.description: Add [gold]Artifact[/gold] and {Durability:diff} [gold]Durability[/gold] to {Cards:diff()} non-Durable {Cards:plural:card|cards} in your [gold]Hand[/gold].

[gold]Alchemy[/gold] with this [gold]Enchants[/gold] the [gold]Artifact[/gold] with [purple]Corrupted[/purple]{IfUpgraded:show:.
Increase its Durability by {Durability:diff()}} and add a copy of this card into your [gold]Hand[/gold].
GLADIUS-STRANGE_MASS.title: Strange Mass
GLADIUS-ASURA.description:
Increase [gold]Durability[/gold] of an [gold]Durable[/gold] card in your [gold]Hand[/gold] by {Durability:diff()}.
Play it on random targets until its [gold]Durability[/gold] reaches 0.
GLADIUS-ASURA.title: Asura
GLADIUS-DRAGONS_DESCENT.title: Dragon's Descent
GLADIUS-MASTERS_REACH.description: The first [gold]Durable[/gold] card you play each turn [gold]Durability[/gold] is not consumed.

The first time you attack an enemy each turn, if it intends to attack, apply {ConcussionPower:diff()} [gold]Weak[/gold].
Otherwise, apply {ConcussionPower:diff()} [gold]Vulnerable[/gold].

GLADIUS-CULLING.description: At the start of your turn, discard {CullingPower:diff()} {CullingPower:plural:card|cards} from your [gold]Draw Pile[/gold] and draw cards equal to their cost.

GLADIUS-AURA_CIRCULATION.description: Whenever you play an Attack, if you have [gold]Dragon Aura[/gold], gain {AuraCirculationPower:diff()} [gold]Strength[/gold].

Whenever you [gold]Alchemy[/gold], Add a copy into your [gold]Hand[/gold] with 1 [gold]Durability[/gold] and [gold]Ethereal[/gold].{IfUpgraded:show:
That cost 0 until played.|}

GLADIUS-DIVINE_DRAGON_FORM.description:
{IfUpgraded:show:Gain {DragonAuraPower:diff()} [gold]Dragon Aura[/gold].
|}Whenever you lose [gold]Dragon Aura[/gold], gain {DivineDragonFormPower:diff()} [gold]Dragon Aura[/gold].

GLADIUS-GLASSBLOWING.description:
Whenever you discard a card, Add a [gold]{IfUpgraded:show:Tuning Shard+|Tuning Shard}[/gold] into your [gold]Hand[/gold] with [gold]Ethereal[/gold].
That cost 0 until played.

Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
Increase this card's damage by {Increase:diff()} this combat.

Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.

GLADIUS-DRAGON_CLAW.description:
Deal {CalculatedDamage:diff()} damage.

Deal {Damage:diff()} damage for each Durability on this card.{InCombat:
